name: Fyodor Dostoevsky
title: Novelist
bio: Russian novelist, philosopher, and journalist. His major works include 'Crime and Punishment,' 'The Brothers Karamazov,' and 'The Idiot.'
faith: After a period of doubt, Dostoevsky experienced a profound renewal of faith during his imprisonment in Siberia. His novels explore the depths of human sin and the transforming power of Christ's love. He wrote, 'If anyone proved to me that Christ was outside the truth... I would remain with Christ.'

sources.title: Fyodor Dostoevsky — Wikipedia
sources.note: Biography including his faith renewal during Siberian imprisonment

sources.title: The Brothers Karamazov
sources.note: By Dostoevsky. His final novel, deeply exploring Christian themes of faith, doubt, and redemption

sources.title: Religious views of Fyodor Dostoevsky
sources.note: Detailed article on his Christian faith and its role in his works

tagline: Chose to remain with Christ even if Christ were outside the truth
